apps.metaDescription: Published apps by Sebastián Muñoz — AntiCallCL (Android, open beta).

anticall.metaDescription: AntiCallCL — a local call screener for Android (Flutter + Kotlin). Filter by prefix, no cloud, no accounts. Open beta.

hero.title: AntiCallCL
hero.intro: A call screener for Android. Runs entirely on your phone — no servers, no accounts. You decide what to do with every call.

gallery.subtitle: Click any image to open the viewer.

stack.title: How it's built.
stack.subtitle: The app runs 100% on the phone. No backend, no servers, no accounts.

datos.title: Data we collect
datos.body: AntiCall Chile does not collect, store, or transmit personal data to external servers. All blocking and analysis logic runs locally on your device.
bullets: We do not request accounts or credentials: the app runs without registration.
Blocked numbers and custom lists live only on your phone.
Call metrics are stored locally and you can delete them whenever you want.
We only access system permissions to run essential features and never copy that information off the device.

uso.title: How we use information
uso.body: Since there's no cloud transfer, information use is strictly limited to the app's local operation.
bullets: Process call events on the device to detect and block spam.
Remember your settings, lists, and preferences only inside the app's storage.
Show basic metrics so you can gauge blocking effectiveness.
Let you manually export or delete any locally-stored data.

compartir.title: Who we share with
compartir.body: Nobody. AntiCall Chile does not sell, transfer, or share data with third parties. The app has no ad SDKs or remote analytics.
bullets: No ad network integration.
No remote analytics or beacons.
No third-party services that receive user data.

derechos.title: Your rights and control
derechos.body: Even though the app doesn't keep data on servers, we respect the rights granted by Chilean and international law.
bullets: Local processing: no sync with servers, no cloud copies.
Deleting the app deletes all associated data.
You can review or wipe the local database at any time from settings.

seguridad.title: Security
seguridad.body: All information is stored encrypted by Android itself. AntiCall doesn't open any outbound channels to the internet.
bullets: Encrypted at rest (Android sandbox).
Sensitive permissions (calls, contacts) are user-granted and revocable.
No tracking or telemetry code.

menores.title: Minors
menores.body: AntiCall Chile is not directed at children under 13. Since the app is local-only with no registration, we don't collect user ages.
bullets: We don't ask for age and we don't verify identity.
Parents can supervise the app's use and uninstall it whenever they want.

cambios.title: Changes to this policy
cambios.body: If we change this policy, we'll publish the new version on this same page. The last-updated date is shown at the top.
bullets: Updates will be reflected in the 'last updated' date.
For questions, contact us through the app.
